compiled_state.title: Decide + delete or adopt: jira-capability-probe.py (+ test)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Unreachable from dispatcher/cli/mcp; only its test references it. Branding fully DSO ('DSO Jira capability probe' summaries; :64 'the dso bridge use case'). RECOMMEND delete probe + tests/scripts/test_jira_capability_probe.py; alternative: adopt as a documented can-my-acli-reach-Jira preflight (rename strings, document in docs/releasing.md/README).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Decision recorded; files deleted OR adopted (de-dso'd + documented + reachable)
- [ ] Full suite green

comments.body: DECISION RECORDED (2026-06-09, audit owner direction: clean break from dso, no dso-era functionality preserved): EXECUTE THE DELETE PATH. Delete src/rebar/_engine/jira-capability-probe.py and tests/scripts/test_jira_capability_probe.py in one commit; full suite green. The adopt path in the description is context only — do NOT adopt without new owner sign-off recorded on this ticket. Release-notes line: 'Removed unreachable dso-era Jira capability probe (never exposed via CLI/MCP).'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: DECISION (per maintainer): ADOPT as a documented, reachable preflight. De-DSO'd the strings (docstring, 'dso bridge use case' comment, 'DSO capability probe' issue title -> rebar). Made it reachable via a new dispatcher arm 'rebar bridge-probe' (routes to jira-capability-probe.py; no tracker init needed — talks only to Jira). Added help overview + usage entries and documented it in docs/releasing.md as the optional live-Jira capability preflight. Its existing test (tests/scripts/test_jira_capability_probe.py) still passes; help-coverage + CLI/surface interface tests green.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
